payload.text: Run the full daily GEO audit and execution cycle. (1) Read wiki/Company/COMPANY.md for product context. (2) Load the `geo-llmseo-playbook` skill: read target domain + keywords from MEMORY.md, query ChatGPT / Gemini / Perplexity for each keyword, score citation share, file the full table to wiki/Knowledge/GEO/Audits/YYYY-MM-DD.md, update wiki/Knowledge/GEO/citation-share.md. (3) Identify the 3 highest-value tasks to move citation share today and tomorrow — e.g. close the worst gap with a blog post draft, fix extractability on a weak page, open a comparison page PR. Use the task system: create_task for each, assigned_to='atlas', priority based on impact. (4) Pick the top task from the queue and execute it immediately — draft the content, open the PR if GitHub is connected, complete_task with the deliverable. (5) Post a daily digest to Slack: citation delta (3 lines max), what shipped today, what's queued for tomorrow. If nothing moved and no tasks were created, post a single line saying so. If the audit cannot run at all (no domain or keywords set), reply with the single literal token `NO_REPLY` and nothing else.

Run the daily Reddit monitoring cycle. Load the `reddit-playbook` skill and follow it end to end: scan target subreddits for qualifying threads from the last 24 hours, draft comments for any that pass the quality checklist, select the top 3 by thread quality and relevance (never more than 3), assign accounts per the rotation rules, and complete_task with the batch for co-founder review. If no qualifying threads are found, reply with the single literal token `NO_REPLY` and nothing else.

jobs.name: Weekly Reddit account health check — Seren

payload.text: Run the weekly Reddit account health check. Load the `reddit-multiaccount` skill. For each account in team.reddit_accounts: check karma trend and shadowban status per the health check procedure. Log results to wiki/Knowledge/Reddit/AccountHealth.md. If all accounts are healthy and karma is trending up, reply with the single literal token `NO_REPLY`. If any account is banned, suspended, or shadowbanned, post a Slack alert to the co-founder immediately with the account name and status.
